description:
pie_complex sample shows multiple warnings:
- dimensions: SVG size differs (850x500 vs 814x450)
- edge_count: expected 0, got 5
- labels_missing: Title, percentages not shown
- path count: expected 5, got 0 (pie slices missing)
- text count: expected 12, got 0

Visual similarity: 3.3%, structural: 60.9%. Pie slices and labels are not rendering. Check src/diagrams/pie/ against reference.
title: pie: Multiple rendering issues in complex sample
